article_title: Euro-Office Forks OnlyOffice to Build a Sovereign European Productivity Suite, Igniting an Open-Source Licensing Battle

content_preview.title: Euro-Office Forks OnlyOffice to Build a Sovereign European Productivity Suite, Igniting an Open-Source Licensing Battle
content_preview.summary: A coalition of nine European companies forked OnlyOffice into Euro-Office, prompting an AGPL v3 licensing dispute and the suspension of an eight-year Nextcloud partnership.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

A coalition of nine European technology companies launched Euro-Office on March 30, 2026, forking the OnlyOffice codebase to create what they describe as a fully sovereign, open-source productivity suite for European organizations. Within 48 hours, OnlyOffice accused the project of licensing violations and suspended its eight-year partnership with Nextcloud, one of the fork's leaders. The dispute has escalated into one of the most significant open-source licensing confrontations in ...
